name: supabase-multi-env-setup
description: Configure Supabase across development, staging, and production with separate projects, environment-specific secrets, and safe migration promotion. Use when setting up multi-environment deployments, isolating dev from prod data, configuring per-environment Supabase projects, or promoting migrations through environments. Trigger: "supabase environments", "supabase staging", "supabase dev prod", "supabase multi-project", "supabase env config", "database branching".
